If you've filled up your gas tank recently, you're aware that prices have been going through the roof. They've gone from about $2.29 a gallon to approximately $3.00 a gallon in what seems like no time. Is there anything that can be done to reverse this trend? subject: This is it

body:
I announced my candidacy for U.S. Senate back in May of 2017 because I saw the American Dream at risk and I was fed up with how Jon Tester was failing to represent Montanans. Since my announcement I’ve been criss-crossing the state, listening and speaking directly with Montanans, and seeing what can be done to make sure our veterans are served better.

Peter, I announced my candidacy for U.S. Senate back in May of 2017 because I saw the American Dream at risk and I was fed up with how Jon Tester was failing to represent Montanans. Since my announcement I’ve been criss-crossing the state, listening and speaking directly with Montanans, and seeing what can be done to make sure our veterans are served better. Now, after a year of campaigning for your support all across Montana, it’s time to take Montana’s outrage at Jon Tester and put it into action. Everything we do from this point forward is focused on getting people to the polls, and if we want to oust Tester in November, we have to make sure we don’t leave any stone unturned. To make sure our get-out-the-vote efforts are fully funded, we have to raise $15,000 by May 31st. An immediate donation will help to make sure that we reach out to as many voters as possible and get them to the polls to vote! [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180523_EoM1&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180523_EoM1] Any amount you can give will help our get-out-the-vote operations and move us one step close to defeating Jon Tester. $10 = funds gas to drive 5 people to to polls [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180523_EoM1&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180523_EoM1] $25 = funds knocking on 50 doors [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180523_EoM1&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180523_EoM1] $50 = funds 500 calls to voters [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180523_EoM1&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180523_EoM1] $100 = funds reaching 5,000 voters online [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180523_EoM1&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180523_EoM1] Your support will directly influence what happens on June 5th. Every single vote matters in this election. If we can’t get all of our supporters to the polls, we risk Jon Tester waltzing into another term in November. President Trump doesn’t want that to happen, and I know you don’t either. So please chip in right now and help us raise the $15,000 we need to fully fund our get-out-the-vote efforts. [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180523_EoM1&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180523_EoM1] I need your help now more than ever. Called to Serve, Troy Downing P.S - We need to raise $15,000 before the final end-of-month deadline to make sure our get-out-the-vote operations are as strong as possible. Please chip in right now! name: Mike Siegel
subject: Uniting the Texas 10th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS [https://www
body:
http://www.siegelfortexas.org [http://www.siegelfortexas.org]
Dear Peter,
Last night we had an amazing result, earning 70% of the vote [https://www.statesman.com/news/state--regional-govt--politics/democrat-mike-siegel-face-rep-michael-mccaul-november/Gg2INUoMKiOEETLCAlgpjP/] in the Democratic primary runoff. I am excited to continue to build our campaign to challenge the Republican incumbent, Michael McCaul, who has held this seat for seven terms and who votes against our interests every day he is in Congress.
To win this race, we must unite across the Democratic community . In the primary, seven of us came forward to challenge the incumbent, each representing different segments of this District. I want to honor the communities who have engaged in this critical election cycle, and urge all of us to work together.
In particular, I want to express my admiration and respect for Tawana Walter-Cadien , who has campaigned tirelessly in TX-10 for several years. In particular, Tawana has fought for quality healthcare and necessary support for seniors and veterans. She showed remarkable courage in providing direct aid during Hurricane Harvey and in fighting for voting rights for students at Prairie View A&M University. I look forward to working with Tawana in the weeks ahead, and building on her legacy.
Our other primary opponents also developed key aspects of the Democratic platform. Tami Walker fought for flood control and infrastructure investment in Harris County. Matt Harris identified monopoly power as a pervasive threat to working Americans. Madeline Eden emphasized the need for electoral security; Richie DeGrow shared his experience as a young father in this divisive moment in history; and Kevin Nelson spoke eloquently about the need to improve the social safety net.
The Democratic Party is a big tent for diverse people of conscience . I hope that you will join us in working to organize across each of these communities. Collectively, we can motivate the voters we need to win this Congressional seat.
Together, anything is possible !
With love and respect,
Mike

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: 🛑 Let's put a stop to cronyism in our state government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-m8sXVMlji38L6p9bk-XKNpWmaDSO0cZYuRTEyLfbj4=/bC4tSQtUDGoMYP03t-J-Vo_9UKKc97_5kf-5dBj6SXw=) Friends and Neighbors -- Recently, I shared a _Tampa Bay Times_ article, which uncovered that the Florida Department of Revenue fired top employees and kept positions vacant for months to make room for many of Governor Rick Scott's personal staff who will lose their jobs when he leaves office this year. None of these staffers have any experience in tax administration - the main responsibility of the Department of Revenue. Rewarding friends, supporters and political buddies with jobs they aren't remotely qualified for is just one of the reasons people lose faith in government. [**For that reason, I am calling on CFO Patronis to join me in supporting a tough law to prevent this kind of cronyism in government. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-m8sXVMlji38L6p9bk-XKNpWmaDSO0cZYuRTEyLfbj4=/G8fnq51XbIqK2BbpHF7GOGAoXjCqBrtwpCyyC1Sctik=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) The members of the Cabinet -- and the Chief Financial Officer in particular -- have a vital responsibility to serve as a check on Governor Scott and to make sure that the best interest of the taxpayer and the proper allocation of their tax dollars are the priority, not the interest of the Governor's buddies. Governor Scott's actions -- and the inaction of the Cabinet -- have proven that they unfortunately do not share that outlook. [Help Jeremy Fight Cronyism. Add your name. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-m8sXVMlji38L6p9bk-XKNpWmaDSO0cZYuRTEyLfbj4=/G8fnq51XbIqK2BbpHF7GOGAoXjCqBrtwpCyyC1Sctik=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) **These actions are textbook cronyism, plain and simple, and it is completely unacceptable**. It is apparent now more than ever that taxpayers deserve the peace of mind to know that their money is being used for their best interests, not help the Governor's friends. **[Please join me in calling on the Legislature to enact a strong anti-cronyism law](https://act.myngp.com/el/-m8sXVMlji38L6p9bk-XKNpWmaDSO0cZYuRTEyLfbj4=/G8fnq51XbIqK2BbpHF7GOGAoXjCqBrtwpCyyC1Sctik=?recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** that would require any staff member that serves in the Governor's office to resign for a period of 6 months before they can be considered for another state government job-- and extending the lobbying ban the currently exists for state legislators to members of the Governor's staff. Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---

name: The White House
subject: President Trump’s letter to Kim Jong Un
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9f96b4b87f6dbab77103ca7473b2eea4ba5b157fe9d4ab60d06bfaabd08ac15a56bae25c5755d62080e4f3ddf841c9bc9640743192e98b6) The White House • May 24, 2018
## President Trump's letter to Kim Jong Un
[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9f96b4b87f6dbab9dd342ce8acbc7ddb612ec7c1540467bdc18e8121964129c7bcf582b1f36aa6d48321a2a3d2733bf5823957bb611b837) |
---
|

## MS-13 is a threat to American communities
**President Trump is committed to protecting our communities** from the violence of MS-13, a transnational gang with the motto "kill, rape, control." The threat from MS-13 is no small problem: There are more than 10,000 members in the United States and more than 30,000 worldwide. The gang is active in at least 40 states, as well as our Nation's capital.
**"You said the other day that these individuals are animals** ," Evelyn Rodriguez, whose daughter was killed by MS-13 in 2016, said to President Trump. "You're correct. They are animals in how they kill, how they get these kids and they torture them. No child should ever, ever have to suffer. As parents, we have to endure that pain, that numbness every day of our lives."
**The Administration is fighting back on all fronts**. ICE Homeland Security Investigations arrested nearly 800 MS-13 members and associates in fiscal year 2017--an 83 percent increase from the year before. The Department of Justice has worked with partners in Central America to secure criminal charges against more than 4,000 of the gang's members.
**Ultimately, it is up to Congress to act**. "I am calling on the Congress to finally close the deadly loopholes that have allowed MS-13, and other criminals, to break into our country," President Trump said.
[Learn more about how President Trump is dedicated to fighting MS-13.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9f96b4b87f6dbab7d5db97ae7cc075cc39d31cb690b1f65eb1d422417e8e7590fd29d75205b85b9f5c4fe243d728a23cd091f4e2ec87338)
**Watch** : [Full video of yesterday's roundtable in Nassau County, New York ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9f96b4b87f6dbab4f436099877381550d25bc07435eb325349e9af0e370a0a318aefd6714c787cccc13163dd3400d044fdf4c4c9e5d87b4)

---
|

## 'Welcome aboard and welcome to the good fight'
**Many American college students are graduating this month** , and those at our Nation's military academies are no different. Vice President Mike Pence gave a commencement address yesterday to the U.S. Coast Guard Academy's Class of 2018.
**"On behalf of your Commander-in-Chief** : Welcome aboard and welcome to the good fight," the Vice President said. "Truth is, you assume your watch at a time when your leadership and your service is needed more than ever before, because in our ever-shrinking world, more and more of the threats to the American people are local."
[See highlights from Vice President Pence's commencement address.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9f96b4b87f6dbababa0dffe1c930bfe2372e57a2caa992ee93bfb4989118765b53b91c4d0ace40272e2aa5fc7a6c0bd730cc72e2c506914)
**More** : [Read his full speech to the Class of 2018 ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9f96b4b87f6dbab5161af43f278e925d514c5944b25896de40caeeeb9637a929ac3103c2513d49811dacdafd09fbf8f09c423aba2f02411)

---
Hey --

The polls prove it: the vast majority of Americans want comprehensive background checks on gun purchases.

Almost 90 percent of non-gun owners and 78 percent of gun owners back comprehensive background checks.

Governor Wolf knows we need to improve safety in our communities. That's why he agrees with the majority of Americans, and is fighting to pass comprehensive background checks on guns.

[**But we need to know, do you agree with him?**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecdf3/73a2bc12/3ade3d9d/1fcd9fdb/3000869865/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/background-check-poll?utm_campaign=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_poll_wide&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+But+FIRSTNAMEwe+need+to+know+do+you+agre")
[**Do you support comprehensive background checks on gun purchases?**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecdf3/73a2bc12/3ade3d9d/1fcd9fda/3000869865/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/background-check-poll?utm_campaign=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_poll_wide&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Do+you+support+comprehensive+background+") | | [YES ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecdf3/73a2bc12/3ade3d9d/1fcd9fd9/3000869865/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/background-check-poll?utm_campaign=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_poll_wide&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=7+-+YESnbsprarr")
---
| [NO ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecdf3/73a2bc12/3ade3d9d/1fcd9fd8/3000869865/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/background-check-poll?utm_campaign=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_poll_wide&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=8+-+NOnbsprarr")
---
After the tragedy in Parkland, Florida, Governor Wolf created a School Safety Task Force to improve school safety and security. Because he's committed to keeping our schools and communities safe.

But in Pennsylvania, long guns, including weapons of war like an AR-15, can be purchased in a private sale without requiring a background check by the Pennsylvania State Police.

That's why Governor Wolf is urging the House and Senate to close this loophole, and to have comprehensive background checks on guns.

**[But we want to know what people in Cresco think about comprehensive background checks. So let us know if you agree with Governor Wolf, that we need comprehensive background checks:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecdf3/73a2bc12/3ade3d9d/1fcd9fdf/3000869865/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/background-check-poll?utm_campaign=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_poll_wide&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=9+-+But+we+want+to+know+what+people+in+CITYy")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Background-Check](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecdf3/73a2bc12/3ade3d9d/1fcd9fde/3000869865/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/background-check-poll?utm_campaign=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18__bgchec_clk_clq_act_poll_wide&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=10+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomBackgroundCheck")**

Thanks for responding,

_Wolf for PA_

body:
Demand Congress Fix DACA!

Add your name to call on members of Congress to sign the
discharge petition →
( https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-1161357666745514240?fn=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ln=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&em=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&pc=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ci=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&st=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&hp=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&oc=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ep=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Peter,

The American people and many lawmakers are frustrated by the
lack of action on immigration reform, particularly when it comes
to protecting DREAMers from deportation.

GOP leaders have continually refused to bring DACA
legislation to the floor, fearing a heated debate could fracture
their party and possibly hurt their chances of keeping control of
Congress.

That isn’t right.

We’re not here to play political games. We’re here to do the
work of the people and to solve problems. That’s why a growing
bipartisan group of lawmakers is signing a “discharge petition”
to demand a vote on DACA right now.

Please join me in urging members of Congress to sign the
discharge petition so we can finally have a vote on this critical
issue. Tell GOP leaders to stop holding DREAMers hostage.
( https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-1161357666745514240?fn=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ln=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&em=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&pc=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ci=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&st=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&hp=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&oc=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ep=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Innocent DREAMers, who came to this country as children
through no choice of their own, are being played like pawns by
the president and the GOP.

These hardworking young people are productive members of
society, and they know no other home than the United States. They
deserve to stop living in limbo and be free to move on with their
lives.

Congress has a duty to find a solution for DREAMers.
Unfortunately, GOP leadership is shirking that duty. That’s why I
am standing up and demanding action along with other lawmakers
from both sides of the aisle who care deeply about this issue.

Click here and join me in telling lawmakers to sign the
discharge petition right away. It’s time to solve this problem
once and for all.
( https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-1161357666745514240?fn=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ln=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&em=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&pc=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ci=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&st=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&hp=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&oc=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ep=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Thanks,

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

deductible.

name: Michael Lighty, The Sanders Institute
subject: Your Questions, Answered
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Healthcare in the US
#
Friend,
Healthcare in this country is expensive, complicated, and convoluted. In many cases, media coverage and communication from politicians only furthers the confusion and misunderstanding. With each and every new story and every news article--more questions arise:
**_" What is a single payer system anyway? I keep hearing about Medicare for All too, are they different?"_**
**_" How do we make people understand that healthcare is a right?"_**
**_" I hear all of these stories about other countries with single payer systems. Do they really have horrible wait times?"_**
**_" Why should I have to pay for someone else's healthcare?"_**
**_" How are we going to afford a single payer system? We are already struggling with what we have now."_**
Over the course of recent months, the Sanders Institute has received hundreds of questions like these from our subscribers, followers, and other members of our community. These are questions from people who want to learn about the issue and how they can make a difference to move this country forward.
[**In my newest blog post, I answer 10 of your most commonly asked questions about the United States healthcare system and how it compares to other countries, Medicare for All, and how a Single-Payer system would work here in the United States.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ab68/bed43eb/6c209787/75fdd428/183358295/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/10-questions-about-healthcare-answered")
The path forward is not through fake news and mistruths. It is created through a dedication to education and civil discourse. This conversation about healthcare is the first step towards a healthier America.
Thank you for taking the time to engage with us in this incredibly important conversation.
Michael Lighty
Founding Fellow, The Sanders Institute

subject: The rest is up to you and me

body:
The GOP has finally settled on an opponent for Joe in November. They picked someone who doesn't seem to see the value in working together to find bipartisan solutions to the problems facing Hoosier fa |
---

| | Peter,

You get to know someone really well when you spend time on the campaign trail with them, like I did with Joe back in 2012. The fact is, Joe is the perfect senator for Indiana. He works harder than anyone, always listens, and combines the best of Hoosier common sense with the fighting spirit we need to represent us in the Senate.

The GOP has finally settled on an opponent for Joe in November. They picked someone who doesn't seem to see the value in working together to find bipartisan solutions to the problems facing Hoosier families. Throughout the primary, he spent $6 million on flashy TV commercials, but I didn't once hear him talk about working across the aisle to do what's best for Hoosiers.

**I know Joe doesn 't play by party rules. Instead, he looks at every bill that comes across his desk and asks, how does this help Hoosiers? If we're going to keep Joe's independent voice in the Senate, I need every person reading this to step up. Will you help me re-elect Joe Donnelly, Peter?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Look, I know how tough this race will be. But no one thought Joe would win in 2012, either -- and he made all the naysayers eat their words. How? **His grassroots supporters. They enabled him to campaign in _every_ county and reach _every_ voter.**

name: Team Kasich
subject: This is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
Gov. John Kasich was in Boston on Tuesday to deliver the
graduation speech for Harvard's Kennedy School. He had a powerful
message that is a stark contrast to the current state of our
nation's politics.

Peter - If you have a few
moments, this is worth your time.
Gov. John Kasich was in Boston on
Tuesday to deliver the graduation speech for Harvard's Kennedy
School.

He had a powerful message that is
a stark contrast to the current state of our nation's politics.

Here's more from the Washington
Post's Jennifer Rubin:

"Those graduating from Harvard's
Kennedy School of Government probably did not expect a discourse
on philosophy, God and love when they invited Ohio's Republican
governor, John Kasich, to deliver a commencement speech. But
that's what they got, and judging from the applause, they quite
enjoyed it…"

"The Bible teaches us about
humility, responsibility, justice, he said. "But fundamentally,
it is about living a life a little bigger than ourselves. It
really is about treating others and loving others, which means
doing good for others even when you have no self-interest."

"Kasich then proceeded to talk
about virtue as the foundation for self-governance. Virtues that
"are written on our heart, are instinctive," Kasich said, are on
display all around us…"

His message was both spiritual
and political: We shouldn't wait for the politician on the white
stallion to appear, but rather we need to exhibit virtue in our
own lives, making a difference in our communities and
workplaces…"

If there was any political
message, it came at the end of his remarks. "You want to fix this
country?" he asked. "You fix it where you live, and you knit
together a network of people who seek the truth, who are
objective and rational . . . and you'll fix the country…"

Peter, this powerful message
moved one tent of people in Boston but with your help, we can
continue to grow support around the nation.

Our May deadline is just days
away and it's critical that we continue raising the funds to get
this message out.

Please consider chipping in $25,
$50, $100 or whatever you can to help. We're counting on your
support!

And we'll leave you with these
final thoughts from the Rubin column:

"It was a bracing speech
precisely because it was so different in tone and message from
the ruthless, mean and dishonest politics of the Trump era.
Kasich didn't have to spell it out, but any sentient observer
could understand that he was making a pitch for elevating the
importance of character in politics and repudiating soulless and
cynical politics based on self-interest. It's an attractive,
hopeful notion that we can free ourselves of the knot in our
stomachs and the pounding in our heads that we experience from
following the machinations of Trumpian politicians. Indeed, that
is the premise of our democracy - that it's the people who
ultimately determine the government they get.

We've seen evidence of this
spirit in the #MeToo, "dreamer" and gun-safety movements, in the
efforts to push back on President Trump's overreach and shore up
democratic norms. We will see in November whether that translates
into votes and a change in political control in Congress. If so,
Kasich may find encouragement to start his alliance of sanity, be
that in the form of his own campaign or in a new political
party/movement. If nothing else, Kasich's remarks reminded us
that we can aspire to something better, to simple decency in our
own lives - and in the politicians we elect."
Watch the full graduation speech
(here)
--

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!
-Team Kasich

for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

Our May deadline is just days away and it's critical that we continue raising the funds to get this message out. Please consider chipping in $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can to help. We're counting on your support! And we'll leave you with these final thoughts from the Rubin column: "It was a bracing speech precisely because it was so different in tone and message from the ruthless, mean and dishonest politics of the Trump era. Kasich didn't have to spell it out, but any sentient observer could understand that he was making a pitch for elevating the importance of character in politics and repudiating soulless and cynical politics based on self-interest. It's an attractive, hopeful notion that we can free ourselves of the knot in our stomachs and the pounding in our heads that we experience from following the machinations of Trumpian politicians. Indeed, that is the premise of our democracy - that it's the people who ultimately determine the government they get. We've seen evidence of this spirit in the #MeToo, "dreamer" and gun-safety movements, in the efforts to push back on President Trump's overreach and shore up democratic norms. We will see in November whether that translates into votes and a change in political control in Congress. If so, Kasich may find encouragement to start his alliance of sanity, be that in the form of his own campaign or in a new political party/movement. If nothing else, Kasich's remarks reminded us that we can aspire to something better, to simple decency in our own lives - and in the politicians we elect." name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: I'm in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I officially announced that I will run to be New York's next Attorney General.
#
Peter -
I want you to hear this news directly from me: **I'm in.**
I've been overwhelmed by the support and encouragement I've received over the past few weeks, and yesterday I officially announced that I will run to be New York's next Attorney General.
Your message was loud and clear: People want an AG who is ready to take on the lawlessness, corruption and bigotry of the Trump Administration; who will serve as a check on Albany; and who will use the powers of the office to the full extent to rein in Wall Street and real estate. Most importantly, people want someone who knows her duty first and foremost is to the people.
**I 'm ready to do that. But the only way to beat these powerful forces is if we're in this together, so I have to ask:**
**[Can you make a $3 contribution today to help us build the movement we will need to win? I can't do this alone.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e35/6e822e2f/18b969ef/41721e36/655521610/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjQtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-running?refcode=em180524-full")**
Running against Trump, corrupt politicians in Albany and Wall Street means that there are a lot of wealthy, powerful people who will do whatever they can to beat us.
They want someone who won't scrutinize or investigate them too much -- if at all. Their goal is to make sure the system keeps working for them.
Right now, they think the law doesn't apply to them.
So, let me be clear on this: If I have the honor to serve as your next Attorney General, they will feel the full weight of the law. Justice will be served.
**[If you're ready to help change our system, then we need you to donate $3 today to help send a message that we can and will win. We can only do that if all of us are in this together.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e35/6e822e2f/18b969ef/41721e36/655521610/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjQtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-running?refcode=em180524-full")**
Thanks for chipping in and being with us on day one.
Best,
Zephyr

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: An immoral issue – we must take responsibility
body:
Peter,
This past week a bill was defeated in the Senate that would have required the federal government to balance the budget each year. How sad that such a bill is even needed. It’s almost unfathomable that our national debt now exceeds $21 trillion and is growing out of control. It’s a number so big it’s hard to wrap our minds around.
Our spending is teetering on the brink of no return. The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget estimated the annual deficits could reach 2.1 trillion _per year_ in the next decade. Can you imagine our debt growing at that rate?
It is downright immoral for us to continue piling up this debt on the backs of our children because we won’t take action to do something about it.
President Trump has asked Congress to cut $15 billion from several programs, but even this small budget cut has been too much for Congress to agree upon. Despite a Republican-held majority in Congress we still have yet to see any spending cuts. Both sides of the political aisle continue to perpetuate this mounting problem.
I’m writing to you about this because we Christians can do something about it.
Here’s the truth, our most powerful influence in the political process to advance change is at the voting booth. We have the opportunity this year to take notice of what our representatives have done and what they have not done, and hold them accountable.
We are working hard to empower millions of Christians across the country through mobilization efforts in churches, on Christian university campuses, through TV and radio ads, by social media, and through advanced voting technology to engage Christians to vote!
I hope to see millions of Christians take the lead by electing representatives who understand that spending cuts and a balanced budget are necessary if we hope to reverse this unbelievable burden of debt.
Without the work of organizations like My Faith Votes, many Christians simply won’t vote. It’s estimated that 50 million registered Christians will not vote in this year’s midterm elections. For the sake of future generations, we have a moral responsibility to ensure this doesn’t happen. All 435 seats in the U.S. House of Representatives are up for election and 35 seats in the U.S. Senate; so much is at stake.
[My Faith Votes has a plan, but we need your help](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180524apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180524apl01nd&n=1).
Leading up to the November 2016 elections My Faith Votes reached 1.5 million people _per day_ because of your tremendous financial support and prayers. 85% of Christians we reached turned out to vote their values - well above the national average of 55%.
We must reach even more Christians this year to vote for leaders who aren’t afraid to roll-up their sleeves and do the difficult work. We need to mobilize a force that will vote for representatives who will protect the future of America and the Judeo-Christian principles that have formed the basis of our nation and birthed freedom, peace and prosperity.
Peter, we must not be the generation that allows future generations to inherit the consequences of our irresponsibility. We cannot allow this to happen on our watch.
[I’m asking you to prayerfully give your best gift to My Faith Votes today to support our voting efforts to reach Christians this year](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180524apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180524apl01nd&n=2). We cannot stand by and watch our brothers and sisters of faith sit on the sidelines; we must call them to our duty and unique responsibility to bring salt and light to the public square – to vote!
It’s an honor to be on this mission with you.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180524apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180524apl01nd&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180524apl01nd&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180524apl01nd&n=5).

| **THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW -- Vol. 1
THE BUDGET AND PROPERTY TAX DEBATE** _**Legislative Majority Says Returning _YOUR_ Money & Reducing the Property Tax Burden is a ‘Waste’**_
There’s a lot of noise in the Legislature as some lawmakers resist the Governor’s plan to provide relief from rising statewide property tax rates AND strengthen our public education system.

This year state government has collected more than $160 million more in revenue without raising taxes, including a $44 million tax surplus announced in May. Yet, the leadership in the Legislature is still insisting on raising your property taxes by over $33 million. Here are some important facts you need to know, and some things the majority definitely doesn’t want you to know:

**GOV. SCOTT’S PLAN PROVIDES TAX RELIEF AND STRENGTHENS EDUCATION**

As you know, Governor Scott [has put forward a comprehensive plan](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=384bcf3bcd&e=19cebfe173) that:
* Fully funds school budgets approved in March;
* Prevents statewide property tax rates from rising by $33 million this year;
* Stabilizes statewide property tax rates for 5 years; and
* Generates hundreds of millions of dollars in savings that could be used to reduce the growing inequality between our schools, increasing opportunities for kids and even lowering tax rates in future years.

His plan, developed with support from the non-partisan analysts at the Department of Taxes and the Department of Finance and Management, provides relief from rising statewide property tax rates AND strengthens our public education system.

**THE GOVERNOR’S PLAN CAN ALSO BE USED TO MAKE THE ADDITIONAL PAYMENT (OR MORE!) TO THE PENSION FUND DEMOCRATS ARE ADVOCATING FOR**

The Governor recently noted that his plan could also include the additional payment to the pension fund that the Democratic majority is insisting on, which could save a $100 million in the year 2038.

In other words, it is possible to achieve the fiscal benefits of the additional pension fund payment they want to make AND the relief from statewide property tax rate increases the Governor is proposing.

**YOU’RE PROBABLY WONDERING: “WHY THE HECK ARE THEY REFUSING TO PROVIDE TAX RATE RELIEF WHEN WE HAVE A SURPLUS??!!”**

That’s a really good question. And yesterday, they finally revealed their real motivation.

**THE MAJORITY LEADERS SAY RETURNING YOUR MONEY IS A ‘WASTE’**

According to [VTDigger, ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=03dba653eb&e=19cebfe173)“Although only $34 million divides the governor’s plan from the budget and tax bills passed by the legislature, both sides stood by positions that they have called ‘non-negotiable.’ **The governor will not raise the property tax rate, and legislators say meeting that objective is a waste of taxpayer money.**”

Yes, you read that right.

**THAT’S WHY THEY ARE FIGHTING SO HARD TO RAISE TAX RATES WHEN WE HAVE A TAX SURPLUS**

For the Governor, holding the line on tax rates is about helping Vermonters keep more of what they earn. But the leadership in the Legislature thinks returning the surplus to taxpayers is a _waste_. Apparently they think that money is Montpelier’s -- but Governor Scott knows it’s **yours**. ** And he is going to continue to fight for you.** ###

body:
We need to keep Sherrod in the Senate because no one fights harder for the future of workers and families than he does. That's why I hope you'll join the event below. | |
---
Friend, How do Democrats win in 2018 and beyond? That's a question that's asked of me all the time. My answer is always consistent. **We need a robust economic message that speaks to working people.** When we talk about lifting workers and raising wages, we win. When we talk about kitchen table issues with the unemployed and the underemployed, we win. When we have one-on-one conversations with working people about their aspirations and dreams, we win. And when we make clear we're the party that protects Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare, we win. **No one drives that message home harder than Sherrod Brown.** We need to keep Sherrod in the Senate because no one fights harder for the future of workers and families than he does. That's why I hope you'll join the event below.
> | **Who:** | [Warren Mayor William D. Franklin, SENATOR SHERROD BROWN + YOU!](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9542/5486deaa/28943c3a/dcc24f4/174585302/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/contribute/warren-youngstown-a2c2c3")
> ---|---
> **Where:** | The B&O Station
> 530 Mahoning Ave. Youngstown, OH 44502
> **When:** | **Sunday, June 3rd**
> **Time:** | **3:30pm - 5:30pm**
[RSVP](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9542/5486deaa/28943c3a/dcc24f7/174585302/VEsE/ "http://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/contribute/warren-youngstown-a2c2c3")

We're a big tent party. We don't leave anyone behind. But when we talk to middle-class families and those who are trying to make it into the middle class about their future - that's when we win.

**Sherrod delivers that message better than anyone I know. We can't lose his voice in the Senate.**

[RSVPs and contributions can be made here.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9542/5486deaa/28943c3a/dcc24f4/174585302/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/contribute/warren-youngstown-a2c2c3") You can also RSVP to Troy Gawlak at (330) 806-0449 or [troy@sherrodbrown.com](mailto:troy@sherrodbrown.com).

Please stand with Sherrod. He stands up for us.

Thank you for your support,

\-- Tim Ryan

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

subject: I'm not changing...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" -- but they never use those words to describe the left.

Friend,

The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" – but they never use those words to describe the left.

But... when liberals want to march to overthrow a freely elected president or call for a repeal of the 2nd Amendment, it's fine.

Then, when conservatives like us stand for our values, we're lambasted as "crazy." Talk about a double standard!
[STAND WITH LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=5dd86b5ca5e84b5792205c2a5f02a57f&_e=lRrX8LGWTIQVbOvo_GecXUoxO7_gP9PJw0Th7Oe8FOuv-PZTneGT_QidSDB52aOQZ3NVIYYf1_3ZqzgzcFA1REFL3jtJph5o6Nc7vHxjrRfQ_efVFVWLDg-YQCPmqB0QPAtKk9Mhj0b6wTB0YdyGTvJRkAivVDvS-jYZPmF4WUb0NLW2dSx1k3_-OdConzuIg_Tsf9SAncU-H2EAIGJvWyzGtzUD-9p667iCV6Sb7-G7LXehRdKK9chsJJGupyy8Mhq26Led3cGyKS80K8et3pXPkziY-zt3z9mVGXU_R6Hu4yQq-DMp4ArjI-bRcU6qegrJ1BoIdzbRl4FpN1c6i7MCpL9hgUNb1N-G6vPc2cnU2QlY4JLchw0aUIbOa0WiPkBz2cJk942d4bcj1AkdtPYg5AuTaiNNHAzTxkrf_88%3D)
---

I don't think it's "crazy" to stand for our Constitution.

It's not "crazy" to want Wisconsin families to have opportunities for work.

I don't think it's "radical" to want low taxes, fewer regulations, and less government in the way of our lives.

It’s not "radical" to say that we should protect the lives of the unborn.

I KNOW the people of Wisconsin agree with me on this.

Friend, The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" – but they never use those words to describe the left. But... when liberals want to march to overthrow a freely elected president or call for a repeal of the 2nd Amendment, it's fine. Then, when conservatives like us stand for our values, we're lambasted as "crazy." Talk about a double standard! I don't think it's "crazy" to stand for our Constitution. It's not "crazy" to want Wisconsin families to have opportunities for work. I don't think it's "radical" to want low taxes, fewer regulations, and less government in the way of our lives. It’s not "radical" to say that we should protect the lives of the unborn. I KNOW the people of Wisconsin agree with me on this. But we know the liberal media is out of touch, and they're not backing down from their biased reports anytime soon. So, I'm just going to embrace it. I've accomplished so much by standing by my principles. Side by side with Gov. Walker, we transformed Wisconsin in ways they said weren't possible. I'm not about to back down. If it's so "CRAZY" to be conservative, then call me crazy. I'm not changing. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's assault on women's health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Women should have the final say on their health care.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7976a/2f5ea88d/717044ee/2cbcc8d4/4293689379/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/planned-parenthood-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&utm_campaign=pp-title-x&utm_medium=ema") Friend, They've huffed and they've puffed. But they've finally blown the house down. Just last week, Trump functionally defunded Planned Parenthood, in an outright assault on the health and autonomy of women across our country. From the earliest days of his administration, President Trump has launched a barrage of attacks on a woman's right to make her own informed health choices. But now the president has announced that he's gutting Title X, the only federal grant program dedicated to providing individuals with comprehensive family planning and preventive health services. We know what happens when Planned Parenthood is defunded. It not only means that people have fewer options for birth control and family planning, but it also means that they are suddenly limited in their ability to get access to cancer screenings and general health care. **No matter what Trump does in the other Washington, I promise you this: Washington has been, and will continue to be, a state that stands with women and their right to safe and legal abortion and reproductive care.** [**Will you help me keep fighting so Washington remains a state that stands with women and their right to make their own reproductive health decisions?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7976a/2f5ea88d/717044ee/2cbcc8d4/4293689379/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/planned-parenthood-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&utm_campaign=pp-title-x&utm_medium=ema") If President Trump, Vice President Pence, and their administration insist on using Title X as a weapon against women, I will work with our legislative leaders to make sure no matter what happens in the other Washington, every woman in Washington state has access to all the family planning and health care services she needs. Planned Parenthood is a trusted medical provider to tens of thousands of Washingtonians -- we will not stand for efforts to tear it down. The Trump administration may believe they can gag organizations like Planned Parenthood along with medical professionals and health clinics from providing essential support and information to women, but we're going to keep fighting until these constant attacks are ended once and for all. [**Join me: Chip in now so we can keep fighting for a woman's right to make her own health decisions.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7976a/2f5ea88d/717044ee/2cbcc8d4/4293689379/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/planned-parenthood-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&utm_campaign=pp-title-x&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7976a/2f5ea88d/717044ee/2cbcc8d4/4293689379/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/planned-parenthood-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&source=ema_2018-05-24_pp-title-x&utm_campaign=pp-title-x&utm_medium=ema")

| **Peter,**
**College professors are overwhelmingly left-wing in their biases** \-- they teach their biases to our kids in college, punishing through the grade system those who dare challenge their Leninist worldview.
**What about our middle schools? Does leftist indoctrination happen there too? More than ever.** Our grade-school teachers and administrators are overwhelmingly liberal: only [29% voted for Trump.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=e40f6c19a2&e=9da9b0ca31) The overwhelming majority of Teacher's Unions contribute to democrat lawmakers.

**THE LEFT'S MISSION?**

_**Raise a generation of liberals just like themselves** who will take away our guns, censor speech and Christian faith, and "fight" for "social justice"_ causes like Transgender Bathrooms, "Safe Spaces," and such agenda as:
* **"Gender Fluidity" -- to toddlers: **Teaching [gender "fluidity" to kindergarteners](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=878f8639f8&e=9da9b0ca31) and how ["there are many ways to express gender"](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=6db4eb2033&e=9da9b0ca31) proposed by the National PTA in 2017 and adopted already in several states.

* **Punishing Christians: **[An 8-year old was forced to undergo a "psychological evaluation"](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=559c3e2660&e=9da9b0ca31) because he drew a stick figure of Jesus on the cross.

* **Islamic Indoctrination:** In Chatham, New Jersey, children were taught the five pillars of Islam, replete with films celebrating Islam encouraging children to convert, documentaries, quotations, cartoons, and poetry [praising Allah, and included descriptions of Christians and non-Muslims as "infidels" -- At this same school, a boy had inserted **_one bible quotation_** into his slideshow presentation and his teacher forbade him from presenting his slideshow to his class, ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=9088fece0b&e=9da9b0ca31)telling him that he should reserve such ideas for Sunday School.

* **Green Marxism: **Maryland public schools have made "Environmental Sustainability" mandatory for all students. Students cannot graduate from high school unless they pledge and sign a contract to become "environmentally sustainable" in their communities and support Mother Earth.

**Our children are under attack.**

Under big government and liberal "educators" our children score amongst the lowest in the industrialized world; in reading, **America is 24th in the world out of 38 developed nations.**

**LIBERALS ARE TOO BUSY PUSHING THEIR NUTTY AGENDA TO ACTUALLY EDUCATE OUR KIDS.**

Enough is enough.

Liberal academia are failing our kids, preaching nutty social programs nonstop, and teaching our youngest minds not only to hate the constitution, but to dismantle its core principles.

_The two amendments under immediate attack: _

The First and Second amendments. Freedom of Speech and the Right to Bear Arms. Are they going in order?

**Liberal teachers and their powerful Teachers Unions intend to:**
* Take away guns not by blaming the madman, but by blaming his weapon and teaching their classrooms to do the same.
* Take away free speech by creating "safe spaces" and politically "correct" speech.

Our entire public education apparatus is run by leftists who are convincing every student that any political argument or debate that runs counter to theirs should be rendered "hate speech" and deemed "illegal."

Our children are our future. There is much we can do to fight liberal bias in our schools. Attend Parent-Teacher meetings, get involved with the School Board, take another look at the school's curriculum, consider homeschooling.

_**Importantly, send to Washington brave and principled men like Courtland Sykes who understand and recognize the grave dangers that a liberal social agenda has on our school system and our youngest minds. For it is within our children today, that the future of Liberty resides.**_

Courtland and I are determined to target and to fight **_all_** forces of leftism in our society today -- especially in our schools. Let's take charge. This is important. Stand with us.

Chanel Rion

name: Mike
subject: this is long (money in politics)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
This email is about the powerful, wealthy people who use their money to rig our elections and line their own pockets at the expense of everyday hardworking Hoosiers. |
---

| | Hey Peter --

This email is about the powerful, wealthy people who use their money to **_rig our elections and line their own pockets_** at the expense of everyday hardworking Hoosiers.

**It 's also about what you can do to help us stop them -- starting with pitching in to Joe's re-election campaign. He's always been an advocate for ending the influence of dark money in politics, and now he's being called one of the nation's most vulnerable incumbents. He's going to need as much help as he can get to prove the pundits wrong in November.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211e/7377f838/3fc5f161/51f91598/3001016465/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180524.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211e/7377f838/3fc5f161/51f9159b/3001016465/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180524.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211e/7377f838/3fc5f161/51f9159a/3001016465/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180524.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211e/7377f838/3fc5f161/51f91595/3001016465/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180524.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211e/7377f838/3fc5f161/51f91594/3001016465/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180524.2nd")**
Now about those uber-wealthy campaign donors I mentioned. You hear about them all the time -- people like the Koch brothers. But HOW do they corrupt our political system? Basically, they look at political campaigns as investment opportunities.

**They invest millions of dollars in candidates and campaigns whom they know will pass laws once in office that will make those same donors even richer at the expense of working-class families. That 's how you get laws like the McConnell tax plan -- you invest a million dollars in one senator's campaign and another's, and once they get in office they write you legislation that cuts tens of millions out of your tax bill.**

Joe does it differently. When a bill comes across his desk, he asks himself one question: **_" How will this affect Hoosiers?"_** Joe doesn't work for any campaign donor, president, or political party -- and that's what we should all want in our senator. **But it 's not good enough for Karl Rove, whose dark money group is already spending big in Indiana.**

After Joe stood up to Mitch McConnell's crew and refused to vote for bad legislation like the GOP tax plan and the repeal of the Affordable Care Act, people like Rove were furious. So now they're trying to use their money to defeat Joe and buy Indiana's Senate seat for Rep. Braun, who got rich by cheating workers at his trucking company and then used his position in the legislature to enrich himself.

**If we want a senator who 's accountable to Hoosiers, then we need you to step up and help us fight back against the flood of dark money facing Indiana. [Will you chip in to help us beat Rep. Braun in November? >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211e/7377f838/3fc5f161/51f91597/3001016465/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180524.2nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Mike Lindburg
Political Director

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
---
[](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d384387/169f49de/34248842/33866b08/922449637/VEsH/ "http://bryancaforio.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180524_1_3&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180524_1_3&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180524_1_3")

| | I want to give you the inside scoop into what it's really like behind the scenes on our campaign, Peter.

On our team, two out of three senior staff positions are held by women. That's extraordinarily rare on a campaign, but it's also exactly what you'd expect from Bryan.

**For Bryan, equality isn 't a talking point or a campaign slogan. It's a commitment he's proven in his actions.**

[**_My boss Bryan is the progressive advocate we need fighting for all of us. Chip in before tomorrow at 7am and help us fund our digital ad so we can get his support for women 's equality and women's health out there._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. name: Team Roza
subject: Volunteering for Roza Calderon
body:
Hi Peter,

This is John from the Roza Calderon Campaign. I am emailing you about volunteering through phone banking because you expressed an interest in helping Roza win the election on June 5.

We were polling highest among democrats with name recognition and ballot designation but the competition is turning up the heat in these last days and we need to make sure we can secure one of those top two spots and carry Roza into the November election.

We are looking at least five people per day until election day. Voice to voice and face to face has been the meat and potatoes of Roza’s campaign since the beginning. We are primarily looking for people who can make calls from 6:00 to 9:00 pm to catch people who just came home from home. If these times do not work for you, calling any other time from 11:00 am to 9:00 pm (begins at noon on Sundays) is, of course, greatly needed as well.

Click https://justicedialer.com<https://justicedialer.com/> to for instructions on phone banking.

Campaign phone number: 916-256-3370

My personal mobile number (call or text me): 530-575-5368

It's been about a week since the Pennsylvania primary election, team, and voters across the Commonwealth are fired up.

I spent the weekend meeting with supporters at schools, union halls, restaurants and breweries, and one message I heard over and over again was what a huge opportunity Democrats have this year and how we can't let it go to waste.

I agree. **Democrats ' path to taking back Congress runs directly through the Keystone State.** We have this must-win Senate race, and because we have a new, fair Congressional map, we have the opportunity to pick up _six_ House seats -- that's _one quarter_ of the total we need to win the majority.

**_[We can't take back Congress without strong grassroots support from people like you: will you chip in $5 or more to support our Democratic campaigns today?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e671b/51dbcc2a/fed5e8/3a29db0/1001310308/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYmx1ZXdhdmVwYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW1fMjAxODA1MjRfZnIxX25kX0NBU0VZIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bluewavepa?refcode=em_20180524_fr1_nd_CASEY&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Pennsylvania has strong Democratic roots, but we can't overlook the fact that it went red in 2016. Making sure our message reaches every voter won't be easy, and we can't afford to cut corners. There's too much on the line.

A Democratic majority in Congress will be a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. We'll be able to block attacks on Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. We'll continue to protect the Affordable Care Act. We can prevent unqualified nominees from taking important offices.

But first we need to win.

**_[Now's the time to dig deep, because so much is at stake: Make an investment in a Democratic Congress by chipping in $5 right now.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e671b/51dbcc2a/fed5e8/3a29db0/1001310308/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYmx1ZXdhdmVwYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW1fMjAxODA1MjRfZnIxX25kX0NBU0VZIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bluewavepa?refcode=em_20180524_fr1_nd_CASEY&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Bob
